docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZLEZ, GILBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT BEALE STREET PARTNERS LLC, A COLORADO LLC, DBA ELROYS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
